title: Read a File Asynchronously
description:
Welcome to Rank Challenge. This function reads `data.txt`, but it uses the blocking `readFileSync`, which freezes the event loop.

Rewrite it to use the promise-based API from `fs/promises` and `await readFile`, so the read happens without blocking. Remove the synchronous call entirely.
hints: `const { readFile } = require('fs/promises');` gives you the async version.
`await readFile('data.txt', 'utf8')` returns the file contents as a string.
